ogTitle: Evans Head vs Eveleigh: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evans Head and Eveleigh.
heading: Evans Head vs Eveleigh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evans Head, New South Wales and Eveleigh, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evans Head has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Eveleigh (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evans Head or Eveleigh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evans Head has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Eveleigh scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evans Head scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Eveleigh scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evans Head or Eveleigh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evans Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
